_publications._publicationTitle: ALTERED CALCIUM CURRENTS AND AXONAL GROWTH IN Nf1 HAPLOINSUFFICIENT MICE.

_contextSnippet: The evoked glutamate release (stimulated – initial basal release) was also higher in Nf1+/− cells compared with wild-type cells; 51.1 ± 3.4% total glutamate content/15 min versus 31.9 ± 1.8% total glutamate content/15
details: Evoked glutamate release was higher in Nf1+/- cells: 51.1 ± 3.4% versus 31.9 ± 1.8% total glutamate content/15 min (p<0.05)
